nasb.text: But I heard the sound of his words; and as soon as I heard the sound of his words, I fell into a deep sleep on my face, with my face to the ground.

esv.text: Then I heard the sound of his words, and as I heard the sound of his words, I fell on my face in deep sleep with my face to the ground.

cnv.text: 我卻仍聽見他說話的聲音；我一聽見他說話的聲音，就沉睡了，臉伏在地。

ccb.text: 接着，我听见他说话的声音，一听见他的声音，我便俯伏在地上昏睡过去。
